延伸一点就是实力不行被打压，是个毒点，实力目前主角没有快速提升方法，后面实力上去可能会变好点，但个人感觉撑到实力上去的人会很少","text_exts":[{"e":30,"s":26,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742849582122F8D9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227600446098494653246%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227576326773239991358%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769619053,"group_id":"7576326773239991358","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+TY6pgHuM7nQQu3xallnDE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bad70aa86e6d447d97d12e04b26f5540~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880350&x-signature=BS%2Bt5YEmQDeVm0PkplIXLiRU6E4%3D","user_id":"104724354156","user_name":"日常摆烂%"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104724354156","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1743909616,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7576326773239991358","book_info":{"abstract":"诸天万界     高武     魅魔
洛言穿越到一个与诸天万界勾连的平行世界。

本以为继承一间杂货铺的他，能够安稳度日，有事没事去诸天万界副本内玩耍，顺便收集一下灵魂。

但他手下四个仆从，却是鼎鼎大名的燃烧军团部下！

所以，我要带领他们征战诸天万界，撒下毁灭世界的福音？

不，我只是个杂货铺的老板而已，毁灭世界这种事别来沾边！

“主人～你看这世界真是绝望啊，要不要毁灭？”
“毁，赶紧毁，我还要回家数钱呢……”
